clean_text: Spiced Rum & Pineapple Juice Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Spiced Rum & Pineapple Juice | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS BASE RUM BACARDÍ Spiced rum COCKTAILS SPICED RUM & PINEAPPLE Stir BACARDÍ Spiced into pineapple juice to spice up a sweet drink. It's easy to make and even easier to impress friends. All the better to get you out from behind the bar to enjoy the party. Packed with vibrant tropical flavour, this cocktail is sunshine in a glass. How to make a SPICED RUM & PINEAPPLE 50 ml BACARDÍ Spiced rum 100 ml pineapple juice Servings Copy Spiced with Pineapple ingredients Copied! Spiced with Pineapple recipe One step at a time 1 Chill Fill a highball or Tiki glass with cubed or crushed ice. 2 Pour Pour in the BACARDÍ Spiced rum. 3 Stir Add chilled pineapple juice. Give it all a gentle stir. 4 Garnish Garnish with a pineapple wedge and a pineapple leaf. MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW OUR RECOMMENDED rum COCKTAILS Like This? Try These If this is your kind of cocktail, here’s our selection of other BACARDÍ cocktails that might suit your taste VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS Cuatro Remix Pineapple Potion Spiced & Ginger COCONUT RUM & PINEAPPLE JUICE Rum Punch DRAG TO DISCOVER MORE VIEW ALL RUM COCKTAILS SOCIAL MOVE WITH US A soft sway, or a lively dance. We have something for everyone. Follow us on social to stay up-to-date with the latest BACARDÍ news. #DoWhatMovesYou FAQ WANT TO KNOW MORE? What is spiced rum? Spiced rum is often aged for as long as dark rum, but has added spices and caramel coloring. It usually carries a bold, yet smooth taste. Is spiced rum the same as gold rum? No, spiced rum typically has added spices and flavorings to give it a powerful, unique flavor, whereas gold rums tend to be more mellow. How do you make rum? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.
